prestazioni: Engine: Koenigsegg 5.0L V8 (internal code: *Kappa V8*) with billet aluminum block, forged internals, and dry-sump lubrication. Upgrade to a *Precision Turbo PT6266 CEA* turbocharger (custom-machined compressor wheel for 1.8 bar boost) paired with a *Tial MV-R 60mm* wastegate for precise boost control. Replace the stock titanium exhaust manifold with a *Koenigsegg-developed inconel 625* equal-length header and a *Akrapović Evolution Line* titanium exhaust system featuring a 100mm carbon-fiber exit tip for optimized scavenging and 30% weight reduction.

Fuel System: Replace the stock direct-injection system with a *Bosch Motorsport MS25.1* standalone ECU and *ID1000x* port injectors (secondary fueling) alongside the stock *Bosch HDEV5* direct injectors. Integrate a *Radium Engineering* dual-catch can setup with -12AN lines and *AEM X-Series* wideband controllers for AFR targeting of 11.8:1 under full load. Upgrade the fuel pump to a *Walbro 450 LPH* in-tank pump with a *Aeromotive* external bypass regulator for 1,400+ HP fuel delivery.

Drivetrain & Cooling: Install a *Koenigsegg 7-speed Light Speed Transmission (LST)* with a *Pankl Racing* carbon-fiber driveshaft and *Tilton* triple-plate ceramic clutch. Replace the stock intercooler with a *PWR* dual-core water-to-air intercooler (50% larger core volume) and a *Setrab* 10-row oil cooler with a *SPAL* 16-inch fan. Add a *Moroso* 10-quart dry-sump oil pan with a *Dailey Engineering* 4-stage pump for sustained 9,000 RPM operation.
estetica: Aero: Install the *Koenigsegg Agera XS 'Ghost' aero package*, including a *Vortex Generator* front splitter with active Gurney flaps (carbon-fiber, 3D-printed lattice structure), a *fixed rear wing* with a *dual-element active DRS* system (adjustable via Koenigsegg’s *Triplex* suspension telemetry), and *underbody diffusers* with integrated *blown flaps* for 1,200 kg of downforce at 250 km/h. Replace the stock side skirts with *carbon-fiber vortex generators* (CFD-optimized for 15% drag reduction).

Body: Full *Koenigsegg 'Naked Carbon'* body wrap with *PPG 'Liquid Crystal'* paint (color-shifting from anthracite to deep violet under direct light). Replace the stock dihedral doors with *Koenigsegg 'SynchroHelix'* doors (electrochromic glass with 30% weight reduction) and add *LED 'Aurora' underbody lighting* (RGBW, 12,000-lumen output, synchronized with engine RPM).

Interior: Replace the stock Alcantara seats with *Sparco 'Koenigsegg Edition'* carbon-Kevlar bucket seats (6-point harnesses, 18-way adjustability) and a *MOMO 'Stealth'* flat-bottom steering wheel with *integrated OLED display* (showing boost, AFR, and G-forces). Install a *Rolls-Royce 'Starlight'* headliner (1,340 fiber-optic lights) and a *Bowers & Wilkins Diamond Series* 12-speaker audio system with *DSP tuning* for cabin noise cancellation at 8,000 RPM.
